## COMPLETE URINE EXAMINATION REPORT

| DESCRIPTION             | RESULT       | REFERENCE INTERVAL               |
|-------------------------|--------------|----------------------------------|
| **Colour**              | Dark Yellow  | Straw Colour / Pale Yellow/Dark Yellow |
| **Appearance**          | Turbid       | Clear/Slightly Hazy/Hazy/Turbid  |
| **Chemical Examination**|              |                                  |
| Glucose                 | NEGATIVE     | NEGATIVE / POSITIVE              |
| Bilirubin (Bile)        | NEGATIVE     | NEGATIVE / POSITIVE              |
| Urobilinogen            | NEGATIVE     | NEGATIVE / POSITIVE              |
| KetoneBodies            | NEGATIVE     | NEGATIVE / POSITIVE              |
| Specific gravity        | 1.029        | 1.005 – 1.030                    |
| Blood                   | NEGATIVE     | NEGATIVE / POSITIVE              |
| Reaction (pH)           | 7.9          | 5.0 - 8.0                        |
| Protein                 | NEGATIVE     | NEGATIVE / POSITIVE              |
| Nitrates                | NEGATIVE     | NEGATIVE / POSITIVE              |
| Leukocyte Esterase      | NEGATIVE     | NEGATIVE / POSITIVE              |
| **MICROSCOPIC EXAMINATION** |          |                                  |
| PUS (WBC) cells         | Plenty       | 0 – 5 /HPF                       |
| Red blood Cells         | 02-04        | 0 – 2 /HPF                       |
| U. Epithelial Cells     | 15-20        | 0 – 5 /HPF                       |
